# The REST API serves real JSON over a real local listener.
env MINA_FX_AUTO_LOAD_ENABLED=false
freeport
exec mina serve --db $WORK/rest.db --yes --host 127.0.0.1 --port $PORT &server&
httpget http://127.0.0.1:$PORT/api/health
stdout '"status":"ok"'
stdout '"schema_version":[1-9][0-9]*'
httpget -accept text/html http://127.0.0.1:$PORT/
stdout '<div id="root"></div>'
httpget http://127.0.0.1:$PORT/status
stdout '<div id="root"></div>'
httpget http://127.0.0.1:$PORT/reports/2026.06
stdout '<div id="root"></div>'
httpget -status 404 http://127.0.0.1:$PORT/favicon.ico
httpget -status 404 http://127.0.0.1:$PORT/assets/missing.js
kill -INT server
wait server

# File-backed demo startup refuses when the configured schema already exists, even if empty.
! exec mina serve --demo --db $WORK/rest.db --yes --host 127.0.0.1 --port 0 --quiet
stderr 'demo seeding requires schema "main" to not already exist'

# Access logs can be redirected to a file.
freeport
exec mina serve --db $WORK/rest-file-log.db --yes --host 127.0.0.1 --port $PORT --access-log $WORK/access.log &server&
httpget http://127.0.0.1:$PORT/api/health
httpget http://127.0.0.1:$PORT/
kill -INT server
wait server
! stderr .
grep 'GET /api/health 200' $WORK/access.log
grep 'GET / 200' $WORK/access.log

# Demo startup seeding binds the listener and exposes REST data.
freeport
exec mina serve --demo --db $WORK/rest-demo.db --yes --host 127.0.0.1 --port $PORT --quiet &server&
httpget http://127.0.0.1:$PORT/api/transactions
stdout '"transactions":\['
stdout '"transaction_id"'
kill -INT server
wait server

# Configured backup files can be created through the real REST listener.
freeport
exec mina serve --config-file backup-rest.toml --db $WORK/backup-rest.db --yes --host 127.0.0.1 --port $PORT --quiet &server&
httpget http://127.0.0.1:$PORT/api/health
stdout '"status":"ok"'
httpget -method POST -status 202 http://127.0.0.1:$PORT/api/background-operations/database-backup/runs
stdout '"operation_id":"database-backup"'
httpwait -timeout 10s '"last_success":true' http://127.0.0.1:$PORT/api/background-operations/database-backup/status
stdout '"completed_run_revision":1'
glob backup-rest-files/mina-backup-*.duckdb
kill -INT server
wait server

-- backup-rest.toml --
[backups.file]
directory = "backup-rest-files"
